forbidden_changes: do not add global alive bonus without progress gating
do not only scale all coefficients
do not treat partial_progress as success_like
required_changes: make terminal_bonus achievable with moderate speeds and both legs contact
reduce stability near penalties (e.g., lower coefficients on speed and angle penalties)
restructure terminal_penalty to only penalize clear crashes (high vertical speed > 1.0, large tilt > 0.5 rad, no leg contact)
preserve approach_progress component and progress-conditioned gating

expected_effect: Separate progress, stability, and terminal terms based on analyzer intent.
risk: Delta terms may be noisy if the progress proxy is imperfect.
